response.justification: The role demands 8 years of C++ as a hard minimum plus deep large-scale infrastructure and cloud-compute experience, and the candidate's C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI) plus a university thesis. The bulk of a strong, varied career is in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web/full-stack work. There is genuine distributed-systems experience (microservices at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling high request volumes) and some mentoring/teaching signal, but the core C++ and cloud-platform-architecture requirements are not met.
strengths: Real distributed/high-throughput systems work (millions of HTTP requests/sec, low-latency services)
Long, senior-level track record with mentoring, workshops, and teaching
Strong testing/TDD discipline and broad polyglot engineering range
concerns: C++ experience (~6 months) far below the 8-year minimum
No formal technical-leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
